zh.Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾卡芙特 安布
zh.Cavenby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.Of Clifford Castle, Clifford, Herefordsh: 英國英格蘭賀福爾克利福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Clifford於大約1187年出生在英國賀福爾克利福德時，他的父親Walter de Clifford II40歲，母親Agnes Condet28歲。他於大約1211年與Isabel De Bokland在英國英格蘭賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1263年12月23日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國賀福爾卡芙特 安布。

zh-hans.Cavenby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Clifford于大约1187年出生在英国賀福爾克利福德时，他的父亲Walter de Clifford II40岁，母亲Agnes Condet28岁。他于大约1211年与Isabel De Bokland在英国英格兰賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1263年12月23日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国賀福爾卡芙特 安布。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Clifford was born about 1187, in Clifford, Herefordshire, England, his father, Walter de Clifford II, was 40 and his mother, Agnes Condet, was 28. He married Isabel De Bokland about 1211, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 23 December 1263, in his hometown, and was buried in Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Clifford est né environ 1187, à Clifford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Clifford II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes Condet, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Isabel De Bokland environ 1211, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 23 décembre 1263, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Clifford um 1187 in Clifford, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Clifford II 40 und seine Mutter Agnes Condet 28. Er hat um 1211 in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel De Bokland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 23. Dezember 1263 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Clifford è nato il circa 1187 nel Clifford, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Walter de Clifford II, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Condet, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Isabel De Bokland circa 1211, nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 23 dicembre 1263, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Cliffordが約1187年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクリフォードで生まれた時，父Walter de Clifford IIは40歳，母Agnes Condetは28歳であった。約1211年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでIsabel De Boklandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1263年12月23日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフト アンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Clifford(이)가 대략 1187년 영국 허퍼드실르 클리퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Clifford II(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Condet(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1211년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 Isabel De Bokland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1263년 12월 23일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 크로프트 아브리에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1187–before 23 December 1263: ойролцоогоор 1187 он–1263 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 23–наас өмнө
mn.Of Clifford Castle, Clifford, Herefordsh: Clifford, Herefordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Clifford nasceu aproximadamente 1187, em Clifford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Clifford II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Condet, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel De Bokland aproximadamente 1211, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 23 de dezembro de 1263, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Clifford родился около 1187 г. в местности клиффорд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Clifford II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Condet, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel De Bokland около 1211 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 23 декабрь 1263 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности крофт эмбри, хирефордшир, Англия.

sm.about 1187–before 23 December 1263: e tusa o le 1187–a'e le'I oo le 23 Tesema 1263

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Clifford nació aproximadamente 1187, en Clifford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Clifford II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes Condet, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Isabel De Bokland aproximadamente 1211, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 23 de diciembre de 1263, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
